svg.title: An RPG character sheet showing core progression systems: stats and vitals on the left, a four-by-four inventory grid in the center, and three equipment slots on the right
svg.desc: A three-column RPG character sheet diagram. A header band at the top labels the three columns STATS AND VITALS, INVENTORY, and EQUIPMENT. The left column has four stacked sub-sections. Attributes lists four core stats with their base value plus bonus modifier from equipment: Strength twelve plus two, Intelligence fourteen plus zero, Dexterity eight plus zero, Vitality twelve plus one. Vitals shows three horizontal bars: Hit Points at ninety-five out of one hundred in green, Mana Points at thirty out of fifty in blue, Stamina at eighty out of one hundred in amber. Progression shows an experience bar approximately sixty percent filled with the labels Level five on the left and Level six on the right above the bar, the caption two hundred forty out of four hundred experience points below, and a footnote noting one unspent skill point. A Class footer at the bottom of the column reads Warrior. The center column is a four-by-four inventory grid representation of the lesson's forty-slot inventory, with the caption Showing sixteen of forty slots. Three slots are filled: a green Health Potion flask in the top-left with quantity three, a gray Iron Ore triangle in the middle row with quantity five, and a brown Wolf Pelt patch in the bottom-right with quantity two. Below the grid a Carried legend repeats the three items with their counts, and a gold counter shows one hundred gold. The right column has three stacked equipment slots in paper-doll layout. The Weapon slot at top shows an Iron Sword icon with the stats plus five attack and plus two strength, marked Common one-hand. The Armor slot in the middle shows a Leather Armor chest icon with the stats plus three defense and plus one vitality, marked Common chest. The Accessory slot at the bottom is empty showing a dashed outline ring with a dash glyph and the labels Empty and Slot unequipped.
